name: Super Mario 64 (Render96 + Ray Tracing)
description: Render96ex PC port with HD models, HD textures, and RT64 real-time path tracing. Cross-compiled to a Windows .exe and run through Proton (RT64 is D3D12-only — vkd3d-proton translates to Vulkan). First install ~15-25 min: deps + cross-compile + asset download. Needs a recent Proton (Experimental works) for the vkd3d-proton DispatchRays fix.

romInfo.description: Select your Super Mario 64 US ROM (.z64). Same ROM the vanilla sm64-decomp build uses.
